en.hero.title: Production full-stack engineering with end-to-end delivery
en.hero.subtitle: From feature planning to secure release, every layer is built to run in real production.
en.hero.body: This portfolio sits on the same real deployment path I use for product work: CI/CD automation, EC2 runtime, Nginx + PM2 process management, HTTPS certificates, domain routing, and operational checks after every push.
en.hero.focus.0: Builds maintainable web and mobile surfaces from one shared backend platform.
en.hero.focus.1: Designs API modules around clear boundaries: router, controller, service, model.
en.hero.focus.2: Treats deployment, security, and observability as part of product delivery.
en.hero.focus.3: Balances clean UI with practical engineering decisions and measurable reliability.
en.hero.signal.0: Automated deploy pipeline from GitHub Actions to AWS EC2.
en.hero.signal.1: HTTPS + domain setup with certificate renewal and secure routing.
en.hero.signal.2: Live API health verification after release to reduce regression risk.
en.hero.signalNote: Design inspiration direction: minimal card systems, clean hierarchy, restrained motion, and clear sticky navigation patterns used in modern portfolio layouts.
en.stack.title: Technical stack by responsibility
en.stack.lead: A single product workflow across client, server, and infrastructure rather than isolated tech lists.
en.stack.clients.title: Client layer
en.stack.clients.summary: User-facing surfaces with consistent UX behavior.
en.stack.clients.2: Responsive layouts and UI state handling
en.stack.clients.3: Theme persistence and secure token storage
en.stack.clients.4: i18n defaults with optional server-side overrides
en.stack.server.title: Backend platform
en.stack.server.summary: Business logic and data flow built for product scale.
en.stack.server.2: JWT auth, bcrypt, and scoped rate limiting
en.stack.server.3: Media upload pipeline with static serving
en.stack.server.4: Structured logs with API and DB health endpoints
en.stack.infra.title: Delivery operations
en.stack.infra.summary: Release automation and production runtime control.
en.stack.infra.0: GitHub Actions CI and deployment jobs
en.stack.infra.3: Zero-downtime style process reload and migrations
en.stack.infra.6: Static frontend publish and backend service sync
en.arch.title: Delivery architecture
en.arch.lead: How product work moves from interface planning to backend implementation and finally to secure runtime delivery.
en.arch.planning.body: Portfolio and product screens are designed around clear hierarchy, reusable blocks, and stable performance on desktop and mobile.
en.arch.backend.body: The API layer handles authentication, profiles, social graph logic, posts, likes, comments, privacy rules, and media workflows.
en.arch.delivery.body: Each push runs automated checks and deploy logic, then reloads runtime services and verifies health in production.
en.arch.data.title: Data
en.arch.ship.title: Delivery
en.arch.ship.body: GitHub Actions → EC2 with Nginx/PM2 orchestration, HTTPS certificates, domain routing, and persistent media handling.
en.highlights.title: Project outcomes
en.highlights.lead: Practical capabilities already implemented in the fullstack product and deployment pipeline.
en.highlights.1.title: Auth and account controls
en.highlights.1.body: Signup/login, JWT sessions, username updates, privacy settings, and authenticated current-user retrieval.
en.highlights.2.title: Social relationship workflow
en.highlights.2.body: Follow requests for private accounts, accept/decline flows, and follower/following visibility rules.
en.highlights.3.title: Content and interaction system
en.highlights.3.body: Posts with image uploads, feeds, likes, comments, and avatar management with protected ownership checks.
en.highlights.4.title: Backend quality and resilience
en.highlights.4.body: Rate limits, Helmet security headers, CORS allowlists, centralized errors, and structured API logging.
en.highlights.5.title: Testing and validation
en.highlights.5.body: Integration tests cover auth, protected endpoints, and private-account access scenarios before release.
en.highlights.6.title: Production deployment automation
en.highlights.6.body: Web and API deployment via CI/CD with migrations, PM2/Nginx reload, and live health verification post-deploy.
en.contact.title: Contact
en.contact.lead: Open to full-stack product engineering roles and focused contract collaboration. If your team needs reliable delivery from backend to production, feel free to reach out.
en.contact.hint: Add your email and social URLs in src/config/site.ts, or override copy via MySQL (see server/sql). Buttons appear automatically when links exist.
en.footer.tagline: Full-stack engineering for products that ship — APIs, web, and mobile, with clear ownership end to end.
